Against Defendant Robert Stenson And/Or His Counsel Of Record, Toschi Doyle Houvener Wellen, In The Amount Of $2,310.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Angelica Jimenez In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Angelica Jimenez, Esq. 310-273-1230 Carpenter & Zuckerman for Plaintiff.
Austin Houvener, Esq. 510-835-3400 Toschi Coyle Houvener & Wellen for Defendant.
Court reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229, 415-828-1919, peggytsujimoto@gmail.com (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Ms. Jimenez contests and presents arguments; Disagrees with the court, did meet and confer, responses deficient, at an impasse, should not be sanctioned, the other side provided code compliant responses only after motion was filed, RFP 20 and 21 still deficient.
Court comments and informs Ms. Jimenez of the Court's expectation re: what the legislature requires; failure to meet and confer
Mr. Houvener responds; will further meet and confer, will further continue to provide code compliant responses
Ms. Jimenez requests not to be sanctioned.
Court admonishes parties; CCP 2033.20, meet and confer obligation.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling on all three motions.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Robert Stenson'S Response To Production Of Documents At Deposition Pursuant To C.C.P., Section 2025.480 Et Seq., 2025.410, Et Seq, 2025.450 Et Seq, And 2031.010 Et Seq. And Motion To Compel Compliance Pursuant To C.C.P., Section 2031.320 Et Seq, 2031.210(A)(1), And 2031.010 Et Seq; Request For Attorney'S Fees, Costs, And Monetary Sanctions Against
Defendant Robert Stenson And/Or His Attorney Of Record, Toschi Doyle Houvener Wellen, In The Amount
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (In-person):
Steven Mazza, Esq. 310-273-1230 Carpenter & Zuckerman for Plaintiff. (Zoom)
Austin Houvener, Esq. 921-621-3406 Toschi Doyle Houvener Wellen for Defendant Mr. Robert Stenson who is also present in court.
Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #. 13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com

ARGUED. The Court asks counsel to explain how documents including statement was not produced before depos, not produced for a lengthy amount of time and client's waiver; sanctions
Mr. Houvener presents argments; reviewed matter over the weekend, would like to resolve informally, provides timeline, amended responses prepared, cites case law, attorney/client work privilege, sanctions unreasonable.
Mr. Mazza responds; responses have objections, grossly unfair, argues sanctions.
The Court looks at amended responses from Defense counsel.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT ROBERT STENSON'S RESPONSE TO PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION PURSUANT TO C.C.P., SECTION 2025.480 ET SEQ., 2025.410, ET SEQ, 2025.450 ET SEQ, AND 2031.010 ET SEQ. AND MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P., SECTION 2031.320 ET SEQ, 2031.210(A)(1), AND 2031.010 ET SEQ; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES, COSTS, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT ROBERT STENSON AND/OR HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, TOSCHI DOYLE HOUVENER WELLEN, IN THE AMOUNT OF $9,260.00 PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 2025.450 ET SEQ. 2025.480 ET SEQ, 2023.050(A)(1)&(2), AND 2023.010 ET SEQ.

Plaintiff's Motion is GRANTED. in its entirety, Defendant ROBERT STENSON is ORDERED: (1) to produce documents responsive to Plaintiff's inspection demand, Nos. 20, 21, 35, 38, and 44, without objections; fortwith. Sanctions are taken under submission.***

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #. 13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMT)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for full details)***
